notes: v0.12.8 — HOTFIX: top profile bar disappeared in v0.12.6/0.12.7. The runtime panel script had `var cur_x := w - cur_w` which the GDScript walrus operator couldn't infer a type for (w was untyped), so the entire panel script failed to compile silently — Control existed but had no _draw method, hence the missing bar. Fixed by using explicit `var cur_x: float = float(w) - cur_w`. Same UI as v0.12.7. Windows only.
